ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "cylinders" TEXT /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive" TEXT /* Drive configuration (e.g., 4WD, FWD) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "certification_region" TEXT /* Region where the vehicle is certified */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Classification of the vehicle (e.g., SUV, midsize car) */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* City miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Vehicle weight in pounds */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "emission_certificate_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the emission certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_certification_region FOREIGN KEY ("certification_region") REFERENCES certification_regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission FOREIGN KEY ("transmission") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive FOREIGN KEY ("drive") REFERENCES drive_types ("drive_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission score entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the scores */,
  "air_pollution_score" INTEGER /* Air pollution score of the vehicle */,
  "greenhouse_gas_score" INTEGER /* Greenhouse gas score of the vehicle */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the test conducted */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was certified */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Unique certificate number for the emission test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_scores_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES vehicle_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in BTU/gallon */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor of the fuel in g/km */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "gear_count" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_types" (
  "drive_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive configuration */,
  "drive_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the drive type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive type */,
  "drive_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the drive type (e.g., 4WD, FWD, RWD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the applicable regulation */,
  "environmental_standard" TEXT /* Environmental standard in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_regions_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "average_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon for the class */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution report */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the pollution report */,
  "pollutant_levels" TEXT /* Levels of specific pollutants (e.g., CO, NOx) */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the test conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_reports_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES vehicle_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the emissions test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test in degrees Celsius */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_tests_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details about the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "regulation_code" TEXT /* Code for the regulation */,
  "amendment_history" TEXT /* History of amendments to the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)
